lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass "D:\LifeOS\01Projects\GraduateThesis\250510 Test\卫星图测试\卫星图测试.gdb" poi_街景测试范围_0712 点 # 否 否 "PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_Zone_40",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",40500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",120.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];34876800 -10002100 10000;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;0.001;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 #
